articles.title: Allegri: "I asked the team one thing: not to ruin my break"
articles.summary: Mister Massimiliano Allegri spoke to DAZN after the 3-2 win against Torino this afternoon.

articles.title: Pellegatti: "Relax Cardinal, no one thinks he is the new Berlusconi"

articles.title: Calvarese: "Today the VAR intervention became a matter of pure chance"
articles.summary: Big protests from Milan for the penalty awarded to Torino for an alleged blow by Pavlovic on Simeone.

articles.title: Lazio, Gila has ended up in Aston Villa's sights. Milan and Inter are also on the Spaniard
articles.summary: Mario Gila has ended up in the sights of Aston Villa, ready to invest around 30 million euros to buy him, with 50% of the sum destined for Real Madrid, writes "Defensa Central".

articles.title: Milan, what a difference with Rabiot on the pitch: the Frenchman's statistics in Milan-Turin
articles.summary: We had understood for a while that Rabiot made the difference, but with this evening's performance he gave yet another demonstration that Milan with him and without him have two completely different faces.

articles.title: Allegri defends Fullkrug: "When you don't have continuity in playing afterwards it becomes more difficult, just as a physical structure"
articles.summary: Against Torino Fullkrug started from the start alongside Pulisic, but it wasn't the German's best game.

articles.title: Fundamental victory. Cardinal and the latest inadmissible declarations
articles.summary: 3 very precious points, of vital importance for the Champions League. A draw would have had very serious consequences on the standings and the lead.

articles.title: Compagnoni: “Future evaluations need to be made on Leao, Pulisic in difficulty due to injuries”
articles.summary: Maurizio Compagnoni, in the pre-match of Milan-Turin, spoke like this about Leao and Pulisic on Sky Sport.

articles.title: Daniel Maldini: "I always had the idea of ​​coming to Lazio as soon as they contacted me"
articles.summary: Former Rossoneri player Daniel Maldini spoke to DAZN about his first months at Lazio: "My integration process with the team is going very well, I got on well with my teammates and the environment straight away.

articles.title: Allegri: "From March onwards we need to think about looking at the standings, there's no more time to fix it"
articles.summary:
Mister Massimiliano Allegri spoke to DAZN after the 3-2 win against Torino this afternoon

What was in the final celebration?

“The importance of the match, we are at the end of the season.

articles.title: Juventus draws with Sassuolo, Milan +9 in fifth place
articles.summary: For now it has been a positive championship day for Milan, who won at San Siro against Torino and also extended their lead to fifth place: after Juventus' draw against Sassuolo the Rossoneri find themselves +9 on fifth place oc...

articles.title: Milan Futuro, tomorrow there is Nuova Sondrio. The referee team is designated
articles.summary: After the success in the last round against Oltrepò, which earned the Rossoneri second place in the standings, Milan Futuro returns to the field on Sunday 22 March at 2.30 pm, at the Felice Chinetti stadium in Solbiate Arno, against Nuova ...

articles.title: Primavera, Renna: "High level performance, we tried to come here to play good football"
articles.summary:
Mister Giovanni Renna spoke after today's Primavera draw against Juventus. These are his words after the match in Vinovo, a match that ended 1-1 with a goal from Domnitei:

About the match:

“High level performance.

articles.title: Turin, Simeone: "We didn't deserve to lower ourselves mentally, we shouldn't have allowed it"
articles.summary:
Giovanni Simeone spoke to DAZN at the end of Milan-Turin. The statements of the grenade attacker:

You immediately encouraged the team after Pavlovic's goal:

“I was convinced we were playing a good game.

articles.title: Juventus-Sassuolo 1-1, Bianconeri stopped by Pinamonti. And Locatelli misses the penalty
articles.summary: Great disappointment at the Stadium for Juventus, who were stopped at home by Grosso's Sassuolo. Bianconeri ahead with Yldiz, while in the second half Pinamonti equalized the score.

articles.title: Allegri and the trident: "Our balanced player is Saelemaekers. Every now and then he arrives at the end of the match a little cooked"
articles.summary: In the post-match of Milan-Turin on DAZN, Mister Allegri talks about the famous trident. Today the switch to 4-3-3 in the second half made the difference.

articles.title: Another very doubtful penalty, it is the eighth against of the season for the Rossoneri
articles.summary: In the 83rd minute of Milan-Turin the referee, following a long action, was called back by the VAR for an OFR for a foul by Pavlovic against Simeone who was slightly held back and dropped and asked for the maximum punishment.

articles.title: Brocchi: "Fofana is completing himself. You can see that he is keen to take this step forward"
articles.summary: Positive performance from Fofana, with a goal, after the Frenchman, in an interview with L'Equipe, had confessed to "suffering" playing out of position.

articles.title: Milan today and a year ago, the ranking on matchday 30: +16 for Max Allegri
articles.summary: With this evening's victory, the Rossoneri move back into second place in the standings and reach 63 points.

articles.title: After the break Napoli, Allegri: "It will be a beautiful evening of football and sport, the second against the third in the table"
articles.summary: Milan wins against Torino and overtakes Napoli, who won against Cagliari yesterday. Mister Allegri, after the break, will find the team coached by Antonio Conte: this is his thoughts on Maradona's match on DAZN.

articles.title: Home solidity and worrying trends: All the key stats ahead of Milan vs. Torino
